_comment: Rooftop agility course template. Copy this file, rename it (e.g. al-kharid.json), and fill in the fields. The loader reads every *.json file in this directory. Files starting with '_' are skipped by convention but the loader does parse them — rename when ready.
_id_help: Must match a value in RooftopAgilityScript.RooftopCourseId. Currently allowed: DRAYNOR, AL_KHARID, VARROCK, CANIFIS, FALADOR, SEERS, POLLNIVNEACH, RELLEKKA, ARDOUGNE.
label: Al-Kharid Rooftop
_scanRadius_help: Optional. Chebyshev radius for the obstacle scene-scan. Default 14. Bump up for courses with widely-spaced obstacles (Pollnivneach, Ardougne).
_approachTiles_help: Broad zone where the script accepts 'player is ready to start a lap'. Include the spawn tile and a few neighbours.
_startTiles_help: Subset of approachTiles. The single best walk-to target for recovery-walk-to-start. Keep this small (1–3 tiles).
_fallTiles_help: Optional. Known fall-down tiles (you fail an obstacle and the engine drops you here). Empty is fine — the off-route handler catches falls by elimination.
_lapEndTiles_help: Tile(s) where the LAST obstacle's transport lands the player. For Al-Kharid this is the roof of the bank after the final climb-down.
_validTiles_help: Optional. Union of every stage tile + lapEnd tile. Leave null to auto-compute from obstacles[].stageTiles + lapEndTiles.
_obstacles_help: Ordered. Each obstacle has: label (display name), objectId (RuneScape game-object ID, see RuneLite dev tools), action (the menu verb — 'Climb-up', 'Cross', 'Balance', 'Jump-up', 'Jump', 'Climb-down', etc.), objectTiles (the world tile(s) the object renders on — advisory, the actual click uses SceneScanner.findObjectTileById), stageTiles (the tiles the player walks through to/from this obstacle), timeoutMs (how long to wait before counting the click as failed; bump for slow animations like Climb-down).
